# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

|
---

Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at [information@emilyslist.org](mailto:information@emilyslist.org) or simply reply to this email.

Contributions or gifts to EMILY's List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: DSCC Deadline Alert
subject: ⏰ before it’s too late [TRIPLE-MATCH EXPIRING]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This is the last call for the TRIPLE-MATCH and we'll cut to the chase: we really need your support in before the FEC deadline strikes at midnight...
---
[ ](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170630-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
**> >> LAST CHANCE TO QUADRUPLE YOUR SUPPORT BEFORE MIDNIGHT! <<<
[Don't wait to MAXIMIZE your impact! Pitch in before the FEC deadline >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170630-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
This is it, team. 2 hours is all we have left until June's end-of-quarter deadline -- **and we 're in danger of falling short of our grassroots goal!**

We need your help BIG TIME. Because without it, we can't:

* **_FIGHT_** Donald Trump's and Mitch McConnell's right-wing agenda!

* **_DEFEND_** Social Security and affordable health care for all!

* **_REPLACE_** Republicans in 2018 and elect Democrats!

**We only need to close a $17,439 gap -- if just 655 people donate, we 'll get over the finish line. Will you pitch in? Your contribution will be TRIPLE-MATCHED! **

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode=DPE-20170630-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

** **[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. ** **[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=DPE-20170630-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

****[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170630-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you,

Team DSCC

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Tyler Muench
subject: Tell Your County Supervisor to Vote NO on Another Subsidy
body:
---
| | |
---
| | |
---|---|---
| | Peter,
It's time to act.
Supervisors in Prince William County will soon vote on a $35 million taxpayer subsidy for the construction of a new baseball stadium for the Potomac Nationals.
Unless the team pays for their own stadium, this will be another strikeout for taxpayers. New Jersey and Connecticut residents paid millions for baseball stadiums that [now stand vacant](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=753bc1c3fbd12c3fae1bb3a4eb3ca9cbe80e285dee21e9146a1877303ce369b032f361434de76b2bf97429811205f96a508bc94ab446d5aa "now stand vacant"). As a Prince William County Supervisor, Marty Nohe has the opportunity to fight for taxpayers by opposing this bad deal.
Will you join me in asking Nohe to oppose this bad deal? [Sign the letter today](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=753bc1c3fbd12c3f3dec846271f7de0403d88a0b83b59899c815228ab535006d98c56a9792cfeb16192df314c0b68a813c646d440a2321e9 "Sign the letter today")!
In Liberty, Tyler MuenchField DirectorAmericans for Prosperity-Virginia

---
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
We respect your right to privacy - [view our policy](http://click.myprosperitymail.com/?qs=753bc1c3fbd12c3f90f4a6afb896d3d2d67517edc67a26782c31d89e6e116c8f539e9a6d1635d45d67410648344076e87084699891ce0d9e)
Americans For Prosperity 1310 N. Courthouse Road, Suite 700 Arlington, VA 22201
[Update Profile and Subscription Preferences](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU) | [One-Click Unsubscribe](http://pages.myprosperitymail.com/page.aspx?QS=330c754b5e92df74e8392541f9e9983387e1801e2427978ea50c4656973098c8&subscriberkey=003i00000262AbVAAU)

name: Sen. Chris Van Hollen (via DSCC.org)
subject: I want to say thanks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I want to say thanks. Your commitment delayed a health care repeal vote and together, we can stop the repeal for good.
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170701-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Team,

Now that we've closed the books on our June 30 FEC deadline, I want to take a moment to say thanks.

Republicans have been hoping that our massive resistance to the Trump agenda would slow down. They've been waiting for grassroots Democrats to get weary and let their focus slip.

But you haven't let that happen. This dedicated community of supporters has continued to respond with an outpouring of energy and dedication to the goal at hand.

Thanks to your commitment, we forced Mitch McConnell to delay a vote on the GOP health care repeal plan.

Our fight on health care absolutely isn't over yet. McConnell is planning to bring a revised bill to a vote right after the July 4th recess. Some Republicans are even considering repealing Obamacare outright, without any replacement at all.

But we've already proven that when Democrats stand united, we can stop their destructive, divisive agenda. My Senate Democratic colleagues and I are fighting tooth and nail to block the Republicans' unconscionable health care repeal plan and I know that with your continued support, we can defeat this immoral monstrosity for good.

Thank you for being a part of this team. I'm grateful for your support. Together we will put this country back on track!

Senator Chris Van Hollen

**A quick note on donations, team:**

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- but we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

Please consider contributing today. Many of our Senate champions are up for reelection in 2018 and we know that the Koch brothers and special interests will make it incredibly tough to ensure they can keep fighting for us in the Senate without your support.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-democrats?refcode=DPE-20170701-VanHollen-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. clean_body: I want to say thanks. Your commitment delayed a health care repeal vote and together, we can stop the repeal for good. "= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5" Team, Now that we've closed the books on our June 30 FEC deadline, I want to take a moment to say thanks. Republicans have been hoping that our massive resistance to the Trump agenda would slow down. They've been waiting for grassroots Democrats to get weary and let their focus slip. But you haven't let that happen. This dedicated community of supporters has continued to respond with an outpouring of energy and dedication to the goal at hand. Thanks to your commitment, we forced Mitch McConnell to delay a vote on the GOP health care repeal plan. Our fight on health care absolutely isn't over yet. McConnell is planning to bring a revised bill to a vote right after the July 4th recess. Some Republicans are even considering repealing Obamacare outright, without any replacement at all. But we've already proven that when Democrats stand united, we can stop their destructive, divisive agenda. My Senate Democratic colleagues and I are fighting tooth and nail to block the Republicans' unconscionable health care repeal plan and I know that with your continued support, we can defeat this immoral monstrosity for good. Thank you for being a part of this team. I'm grateful for your support. Together we will put this country back on track! Senator Chris Van Hollen A quick note on donations, team: When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- but we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory. Please consider contributing today. Many of our Senate champions are up for reelection in 2018 and we know that the Koch brothers and special interests will make it incredibly tough to ensure they can keep fighting for us in the Senate without your support.
